topic: "Aura One" wireless earbuds launch event — ultra-premium, titanium-cased earbuds with spatial audio and 40-hour battery, targeting audiophiles and design-conscious consumers. The reveal follows a single-hero-product Apple-style narrative.
style_hints: dramatic reveals, hero imagery, confident minimalism
outline_hint: Title — Introducing Aura One
The problem — Sound deserves better design
Titanium craftsmanship — design philosophy and materials
Spatial Audio reimagined — immersive sound architecture
40-hour battery — effortlessly all week
Seamless connectivity — one-tap pairing ecosystem
Aura app — your personal sound profile
Pricing and availability — three finishes
One more thing — Aura One Pro over-ear
Thank you — order now at aura.com

topic: Studio Forma's complete brand-identity redesign for Lumière Hotel — a luxury boutique property on Lake Como. Showcases the logo evolution, bespoke typeface, restrained colour palette, and environmental signage system rolled out across three properties.

"Velvet Season" — the holiday 2025 campaign for Maison Éclat luxury fragrance. Centred on the limited-edition Velvet Oud scent and its cinematic 30-second hero film, the brief covers art direction, in-store experience, and social rollout strategy.
outline_hint: Title — Velvet Season, Holiday 2025
The Velvet Oud story — inspiration and provenance
Fragrance architecture — notes and craftsmanship
Hero film — 30-second cinematic spot breakdown
Campaign visual language — colour, light, texture
Retail experience — in-store and counter displays
Digital and social rollout — platform strategy
Influencer and PR partnerships — key voices
Timeline — key milestones September through December
Investment overview and next steps

topic: "Meridian" — a premium wellness retreat programme offering curated 7-day mindfulness and movement experiences at a restored clifftop estate in the Algarve. The deck introduces the philosophy, daily rhythm, practitioner roster, and booking tiers.
